rule_metadata.author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Leandro Ferreira
rule_metadata.title: PDF Hosted on Suspicious Site

rules.rule_text:
title: PDF Hosted on Suspicious Site
id: 767a5ac9-e137-40b8-b521-9027e45dffa9
description: Phishing PDFs have been known to be hosted on these sites
status: experimental
author: NTT Security - Patrik Olson, Leandro Ferreira
date: '2023-12-05'
modified: '2024-01-30'
references:
- https://img1.wsimg[.]com/blobby/go/cdd4fda3-76f8-49d7-b169-5b2ae7b3e6b1/downloads/pekotuxaxutip.pdf
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection_host:
    cs-host|endswith:
    - .wsimg.com
    - .imimg.com
  selection_extension:
    c-uri|endswith:
    - .pdf
  condition: all of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Legitimate PDFs hosted on GoDaddy sites
level: medium
tags:
- attack.initial_access
